description: Open the Landsat multi-spectral GeoTIFF at ~/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. Create a 300x300 pixel spatial subset and save it as a BEAM-DIMAP product to ~/snap_projects/farm_subset.dim. Generate a scatter plot for this subset using band_3 (Red) for the X-axis and band_2 (NIR) for the Y-axis. Export the scatter plot to ~/snap_exports/red_nir_scatter.png.
